testsuite.name: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a multibeneficiary cart with two RPTs with a total of two transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a multibeneficiary cart with two RPTs with a total of three transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a multibeneficiary cart with two RPTs with a total of four transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a multibeneficiary cart with two RPTs with a total of five transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a multibeneficiary cart with two RPTs with a total of six transfers, but the cart has more than 5 transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a multibeneficiary cart with three RPTs with one transfer each one, but the cart has more than 2 RPT

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a multibeneficiary cart with two RPTs, on which the second has two transfers, but the second RPT contains more than one transfers

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_multibeneficiary.User pays a multibeneficiary payment carts on nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a multibeneficiary cart with two RPTs with a stamp, but it fails because one RPT has the stamp
